headline: Warner Bros. CEO set to receive big payday from Paramount deal
summary: Warner Bros. (WBD) CEO David Zaslav could receive up to $887 million from the company's Paramount (PSKY) deal. Yahoo Finance Breaking Business News Reporter Jake Conley and Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma outline the details in the video above.

headline: Which S&P500 stocks are moving on Tuesday?
summary: Stay updated with the movements of the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Tuesday. Discover which stocks are leading as top gainers and losers in today's session.

headline: Warner Bros boss to make $700m from Paramount sale
summary: The chief executive of Warner Bros is in line to make more than $700m (£524m) after the Hollywood studio was sold to rival Paramount.

raw.headline: Warner Bros boss to make $700m from Paramount sale
raw.summary: The chief executive of Warner Bros is in line to make more than $700m (£524m) after the Hollywood studio was sold to rival Paramount.

headline: Warner Bros. Discovery CEO David Zaslav set to receive up to $887 million if Paramount deal closes
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery CEO David Zaslav is set to receive up to $887 million in compensation if the acquisition of his company by Paramount Skydance closes.

raw.headline: Warner Bros. Discovery CEO David Zaslav set to receive up to $887 million if Paramount deal closes

headline: 3 Out-of-Favor Stocks Walking a Fine Line
summary: The past year hasn't been kind to the stocks featured in this article. Each has tumbled to their lowest points in 12 months, leaving investors to decide whether they're witnessing fire sales or falling knives.

headline: Elizabeth Warren Demands Answers On $63 Million Trump Library Fund After Nonprofit Dissolution
summary: Elizabeth Warren is demanding transparency on the fate of $63M pledged by ABC, Meta, Paramount, and X to a future Trump Presidential Library.

headline: David Zaslav Deal Pay Could Top $800 Million After Last-Minute Tax Benefit
summary: The sum includes cash and payments for options and restricted stockholdings, as well as a newly adopted tax reimbursement.
